org_constraint: The phrase "Could you please provide more information?" must appear at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "provide" in the email.

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Conference Registration Details

Dear Event Coordinators,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to finalize my attendance for the upcoming gathering. I have reviewed the initial notice but require further specifics to complete my submission process.

Could you please provide more information? specifically regarding the fee structure and any available scholarships.

Thank you for your time and guidance. I anticipate your reply shortly.

Best regards,

Alex Smith<|im_end|>

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Conference Registration Details

Dear Event Coordinators,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to finalize my attendance for the upcoming gathering. I have reviewed the initial notice but require further specifics to complete my submission process.

Could you please provide more information? specifically regarding the fee structure and any available scholarships.

Thank you for your time and guidance. I anticipate your reply shortly.

Best regards,

Alex Smith<|im_end|>
